metadata.description: Seaglass personal memory layer — keeps your AI tools in sync across Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cowork, and OpenClaw.

plugins.name: seaglass
plugins.description: Capture skill + session hooks for the Seaglass memory layer. Pairs with the remote Seaglass connector; includes a local stdio bridge for clients that need one.

plugins.name: seaglass-cli
plugins.description: Skill that drives Seaglass through the `seaglass` CLI instead of MCP. Lower per-turn token cost for shell-capable clients.
